//: Type surface for typescript-eslint (promise rules need type info). Not itself a gate — the CI-gated checkJs pass is tsconfig.checkjs.json, which scopes down to shipped src. But note it EXTENDS this file, so the `strict: false` below is the gate's inherited baseline, not a lint-only setting; tsconfig.checkjs.json re-enables, flag by flag, every strict option measured to cost zero. Tighten strictness there, not here, unless you mean to move the lint surface too.
